titlestmt.titleproper: New York State College of Veterinary Medicine, Biomedical Communications Department records24-14-3352
titlestmt.author: Compiled by Laura Finkel

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: New York State College of Veterinary Medicine, Biomedical Communications Department records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: New York State College of Veterinary Medicine,. Biomedical Communications

did.abstract: Photographs, negatives and contact sheets maintained by the Biomedical Communications Department of the New York State College of Veterinary Medicine, Cornell University, from 1973 to 1996.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: The Biomedical Communications Department of the New York State College of Veterinary Medicine, Cornell University, was created in the 1970s. It was the photography department for the College, and the precursor to the Image Lab. It was dissolved in 1995.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Photographs, negatives and contact sheets maintained by the Biomedical Communications Department of the New York State College of Veterinary Medicine, Cornell University, from 1973 to 1996.

arrangement.head: SERIES LIST
arrangement.p: Series I. Administrative Files Box: 1 One folder of material about the Biomedical Communications Department. Includes a log for orders taken from 1980-1994.
Series II. Photo Files by Animal Box: 1 Mostly photographic prints, many produced by Cornell University Photography, David Grunfeld, and other photographers. Dates range from ca. 1975-1985.

Series III. Photo Files by Photographer Box: 2Mostly contact sheets, arranged by photographer. Most are from David Grunfeld or Cornell University Photography. The bulk of the material is from 1974-1986.

Series IV. Photo Files by Class Boxes: 2-3 Negatives, contact sheets, and some prints, for individual class photos and composites. There are also class lists and other associated paper materials. Class years covered include 1981-1998.

Series V. Photo Files by Topic/Event/Client Boxes: 3-4 Mostly negatives, a few contact sheets and prints. Arranged alphabetically by client name, topic or event. The negatives in Box 4, folder 15 have no subjects indicated but are arranged by order number. Subjects and/or clients can be identified by cross referencing with the order log in Series I, Administrative Files.
Series VI. Slides Boxes: 4-5 Sets of slides in multiple slide boxes, arranged by topic.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: New York State College of Veterinary Medicine Biomedical Communications Department records, #24-14-3352. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
See also the Veterinary College of Medicine Subject Files and Photographs, #24-4-3385 and the Veterinary College of Medicine Dept. of Communications records, #24-10-3338.

did.unittitle: Series II. Photo Files by Animal
Series III. Photo Files by Photographer
Doody, David M - Contacts and Negs
Reis, John - Zoo and Wildlife Symposium - Contacts and Prints

Class Composites for Linda Ritzler, Continuing Education - Classes 1943-1968

Building Drawings, Photos and Painting (Ned Trethaway/Public Affairs)
Donkeys breeding - Antczak - slides negs and contacts
Gordon Woods, Rockefeller Farm - Embryo Transplant

Small Animal Clinic - Dog Procedures - Kirk
